CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Continued To Nov-15-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Continued To May-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Carlos Funes, (415) 713-7745, Defendant/Opposing party on his own behalf with Spanish Court Interpreter laura Villanueva.
Lisa Gampaoli, (415)890-6529, for Plaintiff/Moving party Aracelli Tirado.
Jim Reilly, (415)795-3957, for Defendnat Jorge Balladares.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard no oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS ARACELLI TIRADO and JUAN GONZALEZ's Motion To Enforce Settlement is GRANTED. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
